behavior.idef0:
ctrl User out Frequency out Volume
ctrl User out RadioOnOff
in Frequency in Volume in RadioOnOff ctrl RadioHMI out CurrentFrequency out VolumeLevel out Activation
in RadioWaves in CurrentFrequency ctrl RadioMMI res RadioTransmitter out RadioSignals
in Alarm in RadioSignals in Activation in VolumeLevel ctrl Radio out RadioSound
behavior.description: Capture radio settings, decode radio waves, manage radio modes, and broadcast radio sound to the user.

function.description: The user-facing radio setting function provides tuning and volume input.
The user consumes radio sound and controls radio mode selection.
The HMI derives activation, current frequency, and volume level for the radio path.
The radio MMI decodes incoming radio waves into radio signals.
The radio component combines alarm, activation, radio signal, and volume inputs into radio sound.
